Pipeline Internals
==================

Internally, the pipeline coordinates planning, execution, and storage of
feature outputs.

Main components
---------------

- execution planning
- executor scheduling
- feature storage
- cache management

Reference pages
---------------

- :doc:`../api/generated/voxatlas.pipeline.execution_plan`
- :doc:`../api/generated/voxatlas.pipeline.executor`
- :doc:`../api/generated/voxatlas.pipeline.feature_store`
- :doc:`../api/generated/voxatlas.pipeline.cache`
